rules.approach: Analyze query intent → improve title/meta → add short answer → internal link

candidates.query: retirement income calculator how to use
candidates.diagnosis: Title 'Free Retirement Income Guide 2026' is generic — doesn't answer query intent of 'how to calculate'
candidates.fix_title: How to Calculate Retirement Income — Free Step-by-Step Guide 2026
candidates.fix_meta: Learn exactly how to use a retirement income calculator: what inputs matter, how results work, and common mistakes. Free tool, instant results.
candidates.fix_content: Add short answer block near top: 'To calculate retirement income, enter your current savings, monthly contributions, expected returns, and retirement age. The calculator projects how much monthly income you'll have.'

candidates.diagnosis: Title is formula-slug looking — doesn't look like a helpful page. Meta is auto-generated.
candidates.fix_title: How Much House Can I Afford on $100K Income? — Free Calculator
candidates.fix_meta: See exactly how much home you can afford on a $100K salary. Includes taxes, insurance, and PMI. Compare different down payments instantly.
candidates.fix_content: Add short answer: 'On a $100K income, you can typically afford a home between $300K-$400K depending on your down payment and debt.'

candidates.diagnosis: Geo calculator page — title works but meta may be generic. Page is one of only 3 geo pages kept indexable.
candidates.fix_title: Philadelphia Tax Calculator 2026 — Estimate Your PA & Local Taxes
candidates.fix_meta: Calculate your Philadelphia city wage tax, PA state income tax, and federal taxes in one free tool. Updated for 2026 rates.
candidates.fix_content: Add Philadelphia-specific tax rate table near top: city wage tax (3.75% residents), PA flat tax (3.07%), and federal brackets.

candidates.diagnosis: Position 11 — almost page 1! Title directly matches query but meta doesn't give answer.
candidates.fix_title: $20,000 Loan at 8% for 5 Years — Monthly Payment = $405.53 (Free Calculator)
candidates.fix_meta: A $20,000 loan at 8% APR for 5 years costs $405.53/month and $4,332 in total interest. Use our free calculator to adjust loan amount, rate, or term.
candidates.fix_content: Lead with exact answer: 'Your monthly payment is $405.53. Total interest over 5 years: $4,331.80. Try different amounts, rates, or terms below.'

candidates.diagnosis: Tool variant with formula slug. Needs human-friendly title and meta.
candidates.fix_title: $20K Loan Calculator — 5 Years at 8% APR (Monthly Payment Included)
candidates.fix_meta: See your exact monthly payment for a $20,000 personal loan at 8% APR over 5 years. Adjust the amount, rate, or term and recalculate instantly.
candidates.fix_content: Add short answer block: 'Estimated monthly payment: $405.53/month. Total cost: $24,332. Use the calculator below to change any number.'
